title: Add global exception handler middleware
description: Unhandled exceptions return raw 500s with stack traces. Add app.UseExceptionHandler and a /error endpoint returning RFC 7807 Problem Details.
close_reason: Added app.UseExceptionHandler('/error') + Results.Problem() endpoint + app.UseDeveloperExceptionPage() in dev

title: Fix in-place mutation in UpdateTaskStatusAsync
description: TaskService.cs line 148 mutates existingTask.Status directly. Create a new TodoTask object instead to follow immutability rules in backend/TodoApi/Services/TaskService.cs.
close_reason: Replaced existingTask.Status = dto.Status mutation with new TodoTask object preserving all other fields

title: Add HTTPS redirect and HSTS in production
description: Neither UseHttpsRedirection nor UseHsts is configured. Add both inside if (!app.Environment.IsDevelopment()) guard in Program.cs.
close_reason: Added UseHttpsRedirection() and UseHsts() inside if (!IsDevelopment()) guard

title: Add rate limiting to all API endpoints
description: No rate limiter configured. Add AddRateLimiter with fixed window 100 req/min in Program.cs and RequireRateLimiting on MapControllers.
close_reason: Added AddRateLimiter fixed window 100 req/min, UseRateLimiter(), MapControllers().RequireRateLimiting('api')

title: Add Serilog structured logging
description: No ILogger<T> injected anywhere. Add Serilog to Program.cs, inject ILogger<TaskService> into TaskService, log create/update/delete operations with structured params.
close_reason: Added Serilog (Console+File sinks), injected ILogger<TaskService>, structured log calls on create/update/delete. 62 tests pass.

title: Add FluentValidation for DTO validation
description: Validation is hand-rolled in TaskService. Extract into AbstractValidator<T> classes in a new Validators/ directory. Remove inline if-checks from TaskService.
close_reason: Created Validators/ with CreateTaskDtoValidator, UpdateTaskDtoValidator, UpdateTaskStatusDtoValidator. Registered with AddValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining. Injected into controller. 62 tests pass.

title: Store enums as strings in database
description: Status and Priority stored as integers in SQLite. Add .HasConversion<string>() in backend/TodoApi/Data/TodoDbContext.cs for both properties. Add a new EF Core migration.
close_reason: Added .HasConversion<string>() for Status and Priority in TodoDbContext. Created EnumsAsStrings migration. 62 tests pass.

title: Add AsNoTracking to repository read queries
description: GetAllAsync, GetPagedAsync, GetByIdAsync track entities unnecessarily. Add .AsNoTracking() to all read-only EF Core queries in backend/TodoApi/Data/TaskRepository.cs.
close_reason: Added .AsNoTracking() to GetAllAsync, GetPagedAsync, GetByIdAsync in TaskRepository. All 62 tests pass.
